message:
fix: correctness and mutability fixes across core modules

Assorted small fixes that improve correctness, satisfy the borrow
checker after the TaskHandle::try_join(&mut self) signature change, and
remove unnecessary operations:

- database/pool.rs: Add explicit `return` on Err(DbPoolError::Full) for
  clarity (no behavioral change, but matches project style)
- lab/runtime.rs: Rename `_error` to `error` and add `let _ = &error`
  to suppress unused warning cleanly, instead of using underscore prefix
  which suppresses the binding entirely
- net/quic/error.rs: Use direct variant construction `QuicError::Io(err)`
  instead of `QuicError::from(err)` in test, avoiding reliance on From
  impl when testing specific variant matching
- plan/fixtures.rs: Add `mut` to handle binding needed for try_join
- plan/mod.rs: Add `mut` to driver_handle binding needed for try_join
- runtime/task_handle.rs: Change try_join signature from `&self` to
  `&mut self` to match oneshot receiver requirements; update 3 test
  bindings accordingly
- server/connection.rs: Remove 2 unnecessary `.clone()` calls on
  ShutdownSignal (it's moved into ConnectionManager::new, clone was
  wasteful)
- stream/forward.rs: Add `mut` to rx binding for try_recv
- stream/receiver_stream.rs: Add `mut` to recovered receiver binding

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -667,7 +667,7 @@ impl SharedLabHandle {
             LabJoinState::Ready(result) => Some(result.clone()),
             LabJoinState::InFlight => None,
             LabJoinState::Empty => {
-                let handle = self
+                let mut handle = self
                     .inner
                     .handle
                     .lock()
